free_text: "Levels and gamma-transitions scheme of Sn-114 from
Mixtures of Multipoles in gamma Transitions from the
Reactor neutron beam was filtered by
1 mm Cd, 1 g/cm**2 B4C, 50 mm metallic U,
ARB-UNITS -> NO-DIM , E -> E-NM. E-DN added.
Misprint in LVL-INI value was corrected.
Ref. J,IZV was added. BIB information was added.
Of compiler M.M. Data are given in the article
relative to gamma-line 1299.900 keV taken for 100.,
DATA and DATA-ERR were divided by 100. by compiler.
superseded by newer ones of J,IZV,54 in Subent 003 .
Data were not deleted, because LVL-INI is given.
Of compiler M.M. Data are given in the article
relative to gamma-line 1299.900 keV taken for 100.,
DATA and DATA-ERR were divided by 100. by compiler.
